errors.internal: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

coupons.not_yet_active: This coupon is not active yet.
coupons.below_minimum: Cart subtotal is below the coupon minimum.
coupons.above_maximum: Cart subtotal is above the coupon maximum.
coupons.no_eligible_items: No items in your cart qualify for this coupon.
coupons.only_sale_items: This coupon cannot be combined with sale items.
coupons.individual_use_conflict: This coupon cannot be combined with other coupons.
coupons.email_not_allowed: This coupon is not available for your email address.
coupons.usage_limit_global_reached: This coupon has reached its usage limit.
coupons.usage_limit_per_user_reached: You have already used this coupon the maximum number of times.
coupons.limit_exhausted: This coupon was just used by someone else; please try again without it.

orders.not_draft: Order is no longer a draft.
orders.billing_required: Billing address is required before submitting.
orders.payment_required: Payment method is required before submitting.
orders.out_of_stock: Some items are out of stock.
orders.price_changed: Product price changed since the draft was last viewed.

refunds.input_invalid: Refund body must contain either amount_minor or line_items, never both.
refunds.exceeds_outstanding: Refund exceeds the remaining outstanding amount on this order.
refunds.line_invalid: Line item does not belong to this order.
refunds.line_quantity_exceeds: Refund quantity exceeds the remaining quantity for this line.
refunds.not_refundable: Order is not refundable in its current status.
refunds.fully_refunded: Order has no remaining outstanding to refund.
refunds.deletion_forbidden: Refunds cannot be deleted — issue a credit note instead.
